title: Pokemon Detail Lookup, Derived Views, Units, and Provenance · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Unit Conversion
summary: The inspect command dumps transport JSON, displays raw decimeter and hectogram values without labels, loses API provenance, and panics when optional nested entries are empty. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go unit conversion increment in human-readable validated Pokemon detail view. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
